series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of all monthly, quarterly or annual reports prepared by the Division of Finance (e.g. Monthly Financial Report, SIB Monthly Report, Annual Financial Report, Director's Annual Report, FHWA Annual Report, Annual GAAP Package, Quarterly Professional Service Report, Cash Position Report).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper documents until converted into scanned electronic form, then destroy/recycle paper. ; Electronic: Maintain permanently., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Permanent
